releaseNotes:
v0.23.0 - camera barcode scanning (opt-in):

- New Settings toggle: 'Enable camera scanning' under Camera scanner. Off by default. When enabled, a Scan with camera button appears on the dashboard alongside Add bottle. Useful on phones and tablets without a paired Bluetooth scanner.

- The Bluetooth HID scanner remains the primary capture path and is unaffected by this setting.

- The camera screen always shows a No-PHI reminder over the viewfinder. Camera frames are decoded in memory and never saved to disk.

- Decoded barcodes route through the same GS1 parser the HID scanner uses, so DataMatrix, GS1-128, UPC-A, EAN-13, and other supported symbologies all work as before.

Included from v0.22.2 (sell-readiness licensing + support polish):

- Server-created trials now expire after 30 days instead of staying open-ended.

- License checks include the server-side status timestamp, so past-due grace cannot reset every check.

- Read-only mode now blocks scans, manual entry, bottle edits, quantity changes, pulls, zone/catalog edits, and FDA catalog writes.

- Settings includes Share support bundle with app, license, sync, backup, and failed-scan diagnostics (no patient information).
